title: phlomis bicolor
intro: Phlomis bicolor, also known as the Jerusalem sage, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its striking, yellow and green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phlomis bicolor include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Phlomis bicolor can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
